info.description: Sidecar daemon for agent pods — auth, manifest discovery, proxy, file ops, sessions, metrics
info.title: Agentd API

post.description: Spawns an agent process and streams output via SSE

delete.description: Terminates an agent process by ID

get.description: Returns the current state of an agent process
Returns all active code execution contexts

post.description: Creates a new Jupyter kernel session

get.description: Returns a specific code execution context

post.description: Runs code in a Jupyter kernel and streams output via SSE

delete.description: Interrupts a running code execution in a context

post.description: Executes a shell command and streams output via SSE

delete.description: Terminates a running command by ID

get.description: Returns the status of a command

delete.description: Deletes one or more directories recursively

get.description: Downloads a file from the workspace
Returns metadata for a file or directory

post.description: Moves files from source to destination

get.description: Searches for files matching a pattern

post.description: Uploads a file to the workspace

get.description: Returns a snapshot of CPU, memory, and token metrics
Streams metrics snapshots every 2 seconds via SSE

post.description: Creates the workspace directory for a session

delete.description: Removes the workspace directory for a session

post.description: Downloads and installs skills from a remote store

get.description: Returns info about a specific loaded skill

post.description: Wipes all session data for pool recycling
